title: Hapnin
subtitle: Social Event Discovery Platform
overview: Hapnin is a location-based social discovery platform that helps users find and share real-time events happening around them. Built with a focus on zero-friction onboarding and hyper-local relevance.
problem: Existing event discovery tools required lengthy setup, lacked real-time accuracy, and failed to surface spontaneous local gatherings. Users missed out on events happening in their immediate vicinity.
solution: A lightweight mobile-first PWA that leverages geolocation and interest-based filtering to surface events within a customizable radius. Users can create events in under 30 seconds and share them instantly via link.

features.title: Instant Event Creation
features.description: Create and publish an event in under 30 seconds with minimal required fields. Auto-fills location and time from device context.

features.title: Hyper-local Feed
features.description: Geolocation-powered feed showing events within 1km, 5km, or 25km radius with real-time updates as events are created.

features.title: Interest Matching
features.description: Onboarding-free interest detection using implicit signals from event interactions to personalize the discovery feed.

features.title: Shareable Event Links
features.description: Every event generates a unique shareable link optimized for WhatsApp and Instagram sharing with rich preview cards.

architecture.title: Serverless-First with Real-Time Subscriptions
architecture.description: Hapnin leverages Supabase real-time subscriptions for live event updates. The serverless backend handles geolocation queries through PostGIS extensions, with edge functions processing location-based ranking algorithms.
highlights: PostGIS-powered spatial queries for radius-based filtering
Supabase real-time channels for live feed updates
Edge functions for location processing and event ranking
Static generation for event share pages with ISR

results.description: Events shared at least once on social platforms

testimonial.quote: Hapnin solved a real pain point for event organizers in Lagos. The shareable link feature made it our go-to tool for campus events.
testimonial.author: Chidi Okonkwo
